authenticatorAppDescription: Use an authentication app to generate one-time codes
locationPreferenceRemovedMessage: You will need to select a location on each login
locationSaveMessage: Your preferred location has been saved for future logins
locationUpdateMessage: Your preferred login location has been updated
poweredBySubtext: An open-source medical record system and global community
protectAccountDescription: After signing in with your password, you will verify your identity using a second method.
protectAccountReason: This helps keep your account secure.
protectAccountTitle: Protect your account with an extra verification step.
rememberLocationForFutureLogins: Remember my location for future logins
selectYourLocation: Select your location from the list below. Use the search bar to find your location.
totpEnabledSuccessfullyMessage: Your account is now protected with a TOTP authenticator app.
useAuthenticatorApp: Use a phone app like Microsoft Authenticator, Google Authenticator or Authy etc to get two factor authentication codes.
